_comment: Best-effort Codex plugin manifest. The Codex CLI plugin schema is not yet publicly documented (verified 2026-05-10 via `codex plugin --help` and `codex plugin marketplace --help` — both surface only marketplace-add/remove subcommands without a schema reference). Format below mirrors the Claude Code plugin manifest shape with Codex-flavored field names; treat it as a stub until OpenAI publishes the spec. See docs/cli-support.md for verification status.
name: rolepod
description: 18-agent dev team workflow with gates, simplicity rules, and verify-first discipline. Codex adapter (Lead-only mode).

notes: Lead-only mode: no native subagent dispatch. Spawn out-of-band specialists via `codex exec --prompt`.
No automatic hooks. Use the rolepod-codex.sh wrapper for per-turn rule reminders.
Slash commands not supported in Codex; use ROLEPOD_CAREFUL=1 env var instead of /careful.
